overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a snowy alpine resort village. The character passes stone and wood lodge buildings, crosses an open plaza with a fire pit, and continues through narrow streets toward a ski lift structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine lodge exterior with snow plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the side of a large stone and wood lodge building with mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: large alpine lodge with stone pillars and wooden balconies
snow-covered plaza with footprints and ski tracks
snow-capped mountain range in the background
evergreen trees scattered around the lodge perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a large stone and wood alpine lodge on a bright sunny day. Snow covers the ground completely, and a majestic snow-capped mountain range becomes visible as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central fire pit

events.description: character turns left and walks around the circular fire pit structure

agents.ego_description: navigating around the circular fire pit in the center of the plaza, heading toward the large curved building

entered.detail: stone fire pit with wood logs in the center of the plaza
semicircular stone seating surrounding the fire pit
multi-story curved resort building with yellow and brown facade
alpine lodge with distinctive red roof and stone base

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open plaza featuring a central circular fire pit surrounded by curved stone benches. The character walks around the fire pit while approaching a large curved resort building, with the original lodge falling behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian street between alpine shops

events.description: transitions from open plaza into narrow street between colorful buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow street lined with colorful shop buildings on the left and stone buildings on the right

entered.detail: vibrant red and yellow alpine-style commercial buildings with large windows
beige stone buildings with dark window frames
metal ski lift support tower visible at the end of the street
wooden safety barriers along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow pedestrian street flanked by colorful shop buildings on the left and stone commercial buildings on the right. A ski lift tower becomes visible in the distance as the character walks deeper into the enclosed street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street leading to ski lift station

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing street toward the ski lift structure ahead

entered.detail: tall red multi-story resort building with numerous windows
ski lift terminal structure with gondola cables overhead

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the narrowing street toward a ski lift station. A prominent red resort building rises on the left while the ski lift structure becomes more prominent ahead, with the surrounding buildings creating an enclosed corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright alpine village that transitions from an open mountain vista into a narrow, enclosed resort corridor. It begins alongside a large stone and wood lodge, moving forward as a majestic snow-capped mountain range reveals itself under a clear sunny sky. As the character advances, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the camera circles a central fire pit and stone benches before approaching a large curved resort building. The view then shifts into a narrow pedestrian street flanked by colorful shops and stone commercial buildings, with a ski lift tower appearing in the distance. Finally, the environment tightens into a corridor of buildings, passing a prominent red resort structure as the camera moves directly toward the looming ski lift station.
